# AGENTS.md — generated by Foundry

# Project overview

An extensible terminal applciation with the primary goal to unifiy several tools into one place to minimize cognitive load. The tool provides a robust extension api that allows for all extensions to be fully decoupled from the rest of the application and eachother.

# How to build & test

use the scripts in the package.json file

# Architecture conventions

extension first architecture, all functionalities beyond the basic core features should be provided via the extension api/ipc the core application should not know ANYTHING about the extensions and should not depend on any extensions directly, similarly the extensions themselves should not depend on eachother or anything else beyond the application's api/ipc

# Critical rules

Don't assume. Surface trade-offs and ask if unsure.
Minimum code that solves the problem. No speculative code. Touch only what you must.
Clean up only your own mess.Define success criteria.
Loop until verified.
